title: Departure of Ukraine's popular defense minister sparks protests
subhead: Rallies in support of Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine's young and popular defense minister, were held in Kyiv and around the country on Thursday, after President Volodymyr Zelensky angered politicians, military officials and the general public by announcing his removal the previous day.

title: donald trump seeks to take control of the organization of us elections
subhead: The US president is pushing his 'SAVE America Act,' a bill that would tighten voting requirements and could penalize low-income voters and minorities.

title: heatwave battered france adopts carbon neutrality roadmap for 2050 but must prove its credibility
subhead: On Wednesday, the Environment Ministry unveiled the country's third national low-carbon strategy, the official document charting the reduction of greenhouse gas emissions through the year 2050. The goals are highly ambitious compared to previous policies.

title: mad max on the ocean the cocaine loaded speedboats racing to europe s shores
subhead: In the Atlantic, hundreds of powerful go-fast boats, custom-built to transport tons of cocaine, retrieve shipments from vessels traveling commercial routes between South America, Africa and Europe, according to an investigation by Le Monde in partnership with NDR, WDR, Süddeutsche Zeitung, NRC, IrpiMedia and The Washington Post.
